signals.title: Quantum Space to go public in SPAC deal
signals.summary:

signals.title: Microsoft seeks Nevada tariff to shield ratepayers from data center costs
signals.summary: The proposal would require large-load customers to pay for infrastructure built specifically to serve their projects while preserving standard utility charges for broader grid services.

signals.title: Supreme Court sends furnace case back to appeals court
signals.summary: The top court agreed with the Trump administration that Biden-era rules effectively eliminating non-condensing gas furnaces and water heaters from the market are based on an incomplete legal review.

signals.title: DOE reinstates $57M American Battery grant
signals.summary: American Battery Technology Co. won its appeal after the agency canceled the grant last year. It will continue plans to build a $115 million commercial-scale lithium refinery alongside its lithium-ion battery recycling efforts.

signals.title: Upstart chipmakers keep challenging Nvidia. This time it's Microsoft-backed D-Matrix
signals.summary: Nvidia challenger D-Matrix is entering full production of an AI chip it says is 10 times faster than a GPU and bypasses the memory shortage.

signals.title: Trump says U.S. must 'respond' after Iran shoots down helicopter over Hormuz Strait
signals.summary: The latest clash with Iran over the Strait of Hormuz came as President Donald Trump repeated that a deal with Tehran could be reached within days.

signals.title: Judge restores 5% safe harbor rule for wind, solar
signals.summary: The Trump administration acted unreasonably in eliminating the 5% total cost threshold as a route for wind and solar projects to prove tax credit eligibility, a federal judge ruled.

signals.title: Washington is quietly changing the rules for this vital American industry — and the timing couldn’t be worse

signals.title: Polish-Ukrainian startup develops radar to track elusive, low-flying drones
signals.summary: The technology aims to find small, low-flying drones, including those connected to operators via long, fiber-optic command wires.

signals.title: French jet on NATO mission shoots down drone in Latvian airspace
signals.summary: Military drones straying into the airspace of Russia’s neighbors have stoked concerns that Russia’s war in Ukraine is spilling over NATO’s borders.

signals.title: French Army has recruitment surplus but lacks equipment, deputy chief says
signals.summary: “This year, we’re already slowing down recruitment because not only are we recruiting better, but we’re retaining people better," a service leader said.

signals.title: Airlines find the grass isn't always greener with new engines
signals.summary: Airline CEOs complained that manufacturers aren't making enough of their engines and that they're falling short on reliability.

signals.title: Rounding up the space unicorns
signals.summary:
Once rare beasts, billion-dollar startups are multiplying across new orbital markets. 
 The post  Rounding up the space unicorns  appeared first on  SpaceNews .
